positive: A minimalist, symmetrical illustration of a stylized forest biome scene. The composition features bold, deep emerald and sapphire blue negative space, contrasting sharply with vibrant moss green and warm ochre yellow silhouettes. Central to the design is a group of stylized, fantastical flora—oversized fern fronds, geometric mushrooms, and graceful, curving branches. The style is highly graphic, utilizing thick, consistent line art and solid, flat color blocking (like mid-century screen prints). The forest elements should form a powerful, clean pattern suitable for repeating textile prints. Dramatic studio lighting is implied by the crisp, high contrast edges. Vector art quality, pop art aesthetic, perfect for apparel printing.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, excessive detail, gradients, blurry, artifact, logo, text, signature, watermark, out of frame, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition
